infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Glutenless uses the camera to scan a beer can, bottle, or menu so it can look up gluten content.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Glutenless uses the microphone for voice search.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Glutenless converts your speech to text to search for a beer by name.
